protocol.title: Fucosyltransferase Inhibition Assay on Digital Microfluidics

glycosylation_mix.composition: 10 mM MgCl2, 0.01 mM MU-beta-LacNAc, 0.02 mM GDP-fucose, 25 mM HEPES pH 7.0, 0.05% Pluronics F-68

hydrolysis_mix.composition: 25 mM EDTA, 0.05 mM BgaA (beta-galactosidase, S. pneumoniae), 0.05 mM SpHex (N-acetylhexosaminidase, S. plicatus), 25 mM HEPES pH 7.0, 0.05% Pluronics F-68

protocol.oil_shell: silicone oil applied via coated pipette tip to all droplets

steps.name: Prime buffer reservoirs
steps.note: One reservoir per serial dilution step

steps.name: Load GDP inhibitor stock
steps.note: Loaded via pipetting inlet electrode; covered with silicone oil shell

steps.name: Serial ~5.5-fold dilution of GDP
steps.method: Sequential mix of GDP droplet into successive buffer reservoirs
steps.note: gdpBlank is a fresh HEPESBuffer dispense; serves as 0 mM GDP control. Six serial dilutions span ~4 orders of magnitude, matching the paper's reported range.

steps.name: Dispense FucT enzyme droplets
steps.note: One droplet per GDP concentration (6) plus one for blank = 7 total; all oil-shelled

steps.name: Merge FucT with each GDP concentration
Incubate FucT + GDP
steps.purpose: Competitive binding of GDP to FucT active site

steps.name: Dispense and merge glycosylation mix
steps.purpose: Initiates fucosylation; FucT transfers fucose from GDP-fucose onto MU-beta-LacNAc

steps.name: Incubate glycosylation reaction
steps.purpose: If GDP inhibits FucT, MU-beta-LacNAc remains unfucosylated and becomes cleavable

steps.name: Dispense and merge hydrolysis mix
steps.purpose: BgaA and SpHex sequentially cleave unfucosylated MU-beta-LacNAc, releasing fluorescent 4-MU; fucosylated substrate is not cleaved

steps.name: Incubate hydrolysis reaction
steps.purpose: Glycoside hydrolases release 4-MU from unfucosylated substrate

steps.name: Glycine dilution (bell-curve correction)
steps.purpose: Corrects bell-shaped dose-response artefact caused by GDP quenching of 4-MU fluorescence; restores sigmoidal curve and improves reproducibility

steps.name: Fluorescence detection
steps.platform: Device mounted to 384-well plate; scanned by ClarioSTAR plate reader

steps.name: Pixel count volume verification
steps.purpose: Image-based droplet volume measurement to back-calculate inhibitor concentrations via C1V1 = C2V2

steps.name: Evaluate and dispose

interpretation.high_signal: FucT inhibited by GDP; MU-beta-LacNAc unfucosylated; 4-MU released
interpretation.low_signal: FucT active; MU-beta-LacNAc fucosylated; no 4-MU released

steps.note: Optional 5-fold glycine dilution (1M glycine, pH 10.4) corrects bell-shaped dose-response artefact caused by GDP quenching of 4-MU
